name: Pepperoni, Mozzarella & Broccoli Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions: Cook pasta in plenty of boiling water until al dente, about 10 minutes. Drain, rinse in cool water. Whisk oil, lemon juice, vinegar, salt, oregano and black pepper together, set aside. In a large bowl combine all remaining ingredients. Add pasta, combine. Add dressing, toss to blend. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
